title: Speculative Decoding for Robot Diffusion Policies
description: Ports speculative decoding (vLLM/Medusa/EAGLE) from LLM serving to robot diffusion policies. A tiny MLP draft and the lerobot/diffusion_pusht verifier are gated by an action-difference threshold tau. On 24 sampled frames of episode 0, at tau=7.6 the MLP is accepted on 46% of frames and projected chunked per-frame latency drops from 178ms to 96ms (1.9x speedup) -- hitting pusht's 10Hz deadline that pure diffusion misses, at the cost of +10% action MSE.
